subject: fix(ui): reduce header size on mobile for better space efficiency
body:
Shrink vertical padding (py-6 → py-3), title font (text-2xl → text-xl),
and button heights (40px → 36px) on screens under 640px. Saves ~30-35px
of vertical space on mobile without affecting desktop layout.

Tags: ui, mobile, responsive
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
